channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Behavioral support does not improve patient-directed opioid tapering success
item.description: A randomized trial found that adding cognitive behavioral therapy or self-management support to patient-centered opioid tapering did not improve outcomes.

item.title: Hydrolyzed Rice Formula Effective in Cow's Milk Allergy
item.description: Hydrolyzed rice formula offers an additional nutritional option for managing cow's milk protein allergy in infants, according to Medscape Medical News.

item.title: Ambulatory Surgery May Be an Option for Troublesome HS
item.description: New therapies have improved control of hidradenitis suppurativa, but surgery remains a possible option for rapid relief, according to experts.

item.title: Fathers' Childhood Trauma Linked to Child Behavior Problems
item.description: Fathers' adverse childhood experiences are associated with a higher risk of behavior problems in their children, reports Medscape Medical News.
